description: The GridContainerPreset component generates a GridContainerScreen tab and set it up when not initialized before.

fields._initializer: The C# Type of the object that initialized this preset.
fields._initializedVersion: The version that this preset initialized. Used to reinitialize the Grid Container Screen if it has new updates.
fields._isModified: Whether the Grid Container Screen has new content like facets.

usage: Used to make automatically updating custom screens.
